title: PNG to ICO (Batch)
header_subtitle: Select PNG files and generate ICOs with custom sizes (recommended: one ICO containing multiple sizes).
drop_zone_text:
Drag PNG files here
or click to select (multi-select supported)
sizes_help: Valid range: 1-256. Duplicates will be removed and sizes will be sorted.
footer_tip: Tip: On Windows, an ICO with 16/24/32/48/64/128/256 sizes is recommended for better compatibility.
msg_invalid_sizes: Invalid sizes. Please enter numbers between 1 and 256 (comma-separated).
